title: Direct Server Return (DSR)
description: Analyze the architecture and operational principles of Direct Server Return (DSR). Evaluate the performance benefits of DSR in high-throughput load balancing scenarios. Identify scenarios where DSR can eliminate load balancer bottlenecks and improve efficiency.
objectives: Analyze the architecture and operational principles of Direct Server Return (DSR).
Evaluate the performance benefits of DSR in high-throughput load balancing scenarios.
Identify scenarios where DSR can eliminate load balancer bottlenecks and improve efficiency.
